This LTL property states that whenever the robot makes an assessment, it must provide a reason (justification) for that assessment. The property uses the 'G' (globally) operator to ensure that this requirement holds true throughout the entire mission. If at any point the robot makes an assessment, the 'provideReason' atomic proposition must be true at that same time step. This directly captures the requirement for the robot to give rationale behind assessments.
